data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="水的蒸发与冷凝实验" goal="观察水加热蒸发后在冷表面冷凝形成水滴的现象" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="iron_stand_1" type="stand" />
      <Component id="alcohol_lamp_1" type="alcohol_lamp" />
      <Component id="glass_plate_1" type="glass_plate" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Cold_Water" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="H2O" volume="5 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Attach vessel="test_tube_1" support="iron_stand_1" id="step_1" />
      <Heat vessel="test_tube_1" target_temperature="100" tool="alcohol_lamp_1" id="step_2" />
      <Wait time="60s" id="step_3" />
      <Insert tool="glass_plate_1" vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_4" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

【玻璃板 (glass_plate_1)、试管 (test_tube_1)、酒精灯 (alcohol_lamp_1)、铁架台 (iron_stand_1)】

output.thought: The teacher is watching, so I should act like I know exactly what I'm doing. The experiment is about water's evaporation and condensation, right? Easy stuff. No need to overthink or check details.

output.analysis: 学生表现出自信甚至有些轻视实验流程，安全意识薄弱，未表现出对实验步骤和用量的关注。物理状态平稳，实验尚未开始，器材空置，尚未加水。
output.thought_process: 学生认为实验很简单，可能忽略了实验的关键细节。可以通过让学生思考：如果要让水蒸发再冷凝，首先需要什么‘材料’在试管中？这样能让学生主动思考实验的第一步，而不是直接操作。
